features.name: signed_input_multiplication_shift
features.description: Code should include a signed operand multiplied by a constant and used as a shift amount

features.name: signed_multiplication_to_shiftadd_optimization
features.description: Code should include a signed value multiplied by a constant being optimized to shift-add pattern
features.snippet:
input signed [2:0] x;
wire [5:0] t = x * 3;
